description: Ville historique du sud, patrie de la pizza. Communauté musulmane et options halal autour du centre et de la gare centrale.

description_en: Naples may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 19 halal restaurants and 2 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Naples, Italy, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Naples: 19+ halal restaurants, 2 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
